author: suctl
description: Manages systemd services and provides Linux OS diagnostics (logs, resources, processes, network).

capabilities.name: os.service.discover
capabilities.description: List all systemd service units with load/active/sub state.

capabilities.name: os.service.list
capabilities.description: List suctl-registered services with live systemd state.

capabilities.name: os.service.register
capabilities.description: Register a systemd service for suctl management.

capabilities.name: os.service.unregister
capabilities.description: Remove a service from suctl management.

capabilities.name: os.service.status
capabilities.description: Get live systemd status for a service.

capabilities.name: os.service.start
capabilities.description: Start a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.stop
capabilities.description: Stop a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.restart
capabilities.description: Restart a registered service via systemd D-Bus.

capabilities.name: os.service.survey
capabilities.description: Survey suctl-registered services with live systemd active/sub state for the service surface.

capabilities.name: os.service.focus
capabilities.description: Focus view for one registered service: full systemd state plus state-valid actions.

capabilities.name: os.log.tail
capabilities.description: Tail the last N log lines for a service from journald or a file.

capabilities.name: os.log.since
capabilities.description: Fetch journal entries for a service since a relative duration (e.g. 1h, 30m).

capabilities.name: os.log.search
capabilities.description: Search journal or log file for a pattern.

capabilities.name: os.log.level
capabilities.description: Fetch journal entries at or above a syslog priority level.

params.name: level
params.description: Priority: emerg alert crit err warning notice info debug (default err)

capabilities.name: os.resource.cpu
capabilities.description: Sample CPU usage across all cores over 500ms.

capabilities.name: os.resource.memory
capabilities.description: Read /proc/meminfo and return memory statistics.

capabilities.name: os.resource.disk
capabilities.description: Run df -h and return disk usage.

capabilities.name: os.process.top
capabilities.description: List top N processes sorted by CPU or memory usage.

capabilities.name: os.network.ports
capabilities.description: List listening TCP/UDP ports via ss -tlnp.

capabilities.name: os.network.connections
capabilities.description: List active network connections via ss -tanp.
